claim.text: Version 3.2.0 of the software introduced a breaking change to the configuration file format.

evidence.description: The official CHANGELOG.md entry for version 3.2.0 explicitly states that the configuration format changed and is not backward-compatible.
evidence.citation: v3.2.0 (2026-01-10): Breaking change — configuration schema updated. See migration guide.

reasoning_atoms.statement: The CHANGELOG entry for v3.2.0 explicitly labels the configuration change as breaking.

assumptions.text: The CHANGELOG accurately reflects the actual behavior of the release.

validators.name: cor-proof Python validator
validators.comments: Validated against COR Proof L1 schema v1.0.1 (draft 2020-12).

metadata.notes: Minimal valid COR Proof L1 artifact. Neutral domain. Used for package testing and demonstration.
